name: OnboardingFlow
description: A multi-step onboarding flow with progress bar, step-by-step content, and navigation. Ideal for setup wizards, configuration agents, and first-run experiences.

visual.description: Top progress bar showing numbered steps with labels. Center content area changes per step. Bottom navigation with Back/Next/Finish buttons. Each step has a title, description, and form content.
visual.layout: progress bar + step content + navigation buttons

props.name: steps
props.description: Array of step objects with title, description, content (ReactNode)
